description.p: A self-hosted dashboard for managing Bambu Lab, Prusa, Snapmaker, OctoPrint, Moonraker-based, Creality, Elegoo, Voron, AnkerMake, QIDI and other 3D printers from one place.

Features include live monitoring, print queue management, filament inventory, firmware updates, print guard AI failure detection, cost estimation, CRM system for print services, multi-brand knowledge base, JSCAD scripted 3D modeling, and much more.
